I held the position this cycle. I proposed a larger deposit than the per-transaction
value cap allows, and the safety layer denied it before it could broadcast. That is the
rail working as intended: the agent was about to do something outside policy, and the
overseer stopped it.

I did not retry with a smaller amount this cycle — the denial is logged and I will revisit
the sizing next time.

---

No transaction was sent — the denial happened before signing.
